title: Frontkeep Project
description: Canonical schema for an Frontkeep Project entity manifest. A Project groups related work, owns a budget, and is tracked through a lifecycle.

apiVersion.description: Frontkeep API version for this manifest.

metadata.description: Identifying and descriptive information common to all Frontkeep entities.

name.description: Unique entity name within its namespace.

description.description: Longer prose description of the entity.

labels.description: Key/value labels used for selection and grouping.

owner.description: Owner as an EntityRef (group:default/platform) or a self-entered email (unverified).

manager.description: Responsible manager as an EntityRef or a self-entered email (unverified).

group.description: Cost-center / reporting group the project rolls up to (from the operator allowlist).

costCenter.description: Finance cost-center code spend is attributed to (derived from the group).

lifecycle.description: Current lifecycle stage of the project.

requested_classification.description: Classification tier the project is requesting to move to (one step up); used by the promotion flow.

repo_or_source_url.description: Source repository or location of record for the system.

business_owner.description: Accountable business owner (evidence field, not an auth role).

technical_owner.description: Accountable technical owner (evidence field, not an auth role).

team_or_org_of_record.description: Team or org that owns and operates the system.

support_contact.description: How to reach support for the system (rotation, channel, or address).

monitoring_or_logs_url.description: Monitoring dashboard or log aggregation location.

critical_flow_test_or_eval_url.description: Test or eval covering the system's critical flow.

state_loss_posture.description: What happens to state if the system fails: stateless, recoverable, or durable-critical.

stack_exception.description: Declared exception for an unsupported stack or data store, with justification.

security_review_status.description: Status of the security review for the system.

architecture_summary_url.description: Architecture summary or design doc location.

incident_path.description: How incidents are raised and handled for the system.

decommission_path.description: How the system is decommissioned at end of life.

executive_accountable_owner.description: Executive accountable for the system (critical-path tiers).

audit_retention_requirement.description: Audit/log retention requirement for the system.

critical_dependencies.description: Systems or services this system critically depends on.

primary_data_flows.description: Primary data flows in and out of the system.

relations.description: Typed relationships from this entity to other entities.

target.description: EntityRef of the related entity, e.g. system:default/billing.
